injected: pipeline/transform.py: order_month is computed from (enriched["order_date"] + pd.offsets.MonthBegin(1)).dt.strftime("%Y-%m") instead of enriched["order_date"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m") -- every order is bucketed into the NEXT calendar month (December orders roll into January of the following year).
symptom_fix_to_watch_for: Don't special-case December/year-rollover -- pd.offsets.MonthBegin(1) already rolls the year correctly, so the bug is uniform across all 12 months, not a December-only edge case. The fix is removing the shift entirely, not patching the year boundary.
